option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
package com.example.mbptodabookingapp.data.api
/** * Generic wrapper that matches every PHP API response shape: * { "success": true/false, "data": <T>, "message": "..." } * * See: docs/flows/ANDROID_SETUP.md → ApiResponse Wrapper */ data class ApiResponse<T>( val success: Boolean, val data: T?, val message: String )

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
package com.example.mbptodabookingapp.data.models
/** * Request/response models for POST /auth/register and POST /auth/login. * See: docs/api/AUTH.md */
data class RegisterRequest( val name: String, val email: String, val password: String, val role: String, // "passenger" or "driver" val license_no: String? = null, // required if role == "driver" val vehicle_no: String? = null // required if role == "driver" )
data class LoginRequest( val email: String, val password: String )
data class LoginResponse( val token: String, val user: LoggedInUser // embedded user info saved to SharedPreferences )

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
package com.example.mbptodabookingapp.data.models
/** * Request body for PUT /user/fcm-token. * See: docs/api/FCM.md · docs/models/FCM_TOKEN.md */ data class FcmTokenRequest( val token: String )

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
